title: Aaron Keener
summary: A first-wave Division Agent who went rogue and became the central target of the Warlords of New York manhunt.

claims.text: Aaron Keener is identified as a rogue first-wave Division Agent who worked with the Last Man Battalion and other rogue Agents.
The Warlords of New York premise places Keener in control of Lower Manhattan after uniting New York factions under his banner.
The expansion overview attributes a recent Lower Manhattan biological attack to Keener and says SHD believes he is planning further attacks.

paragraphs.text: Keener begins as a first-wave SHD Agent and becomes a rogue actor whose plans connect the original game to The Division 2's return to New York.
By the expansion's opening premise, Keener controls Lower Manhattan through rogue lieutenants and aligned factions, and SHD holds him responsible for a new biological attack.

verification.notes: This version deliberately stops at the Warlords of New York opening premise; later seasonal status changes need a separate current-canon review.
